name: set_logic_dc
short_description: Sets logic dc for input ports and input pins
full_help:
set_logic_dc

Description: 
Sets logic dc for input ports and input pins

Syntax: 
set_logic_dc  [-quiet] [-verbose] <objects>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <objects>   List of input ports and input pins

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
